security.csp: default-src 'self' http://ipc.localhost; connect-src 'self' http://ipc.localhost http://tauri.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://lu-labs.ai https://*.supabase.co https://civitai.com https://*.civitai.com https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://ollama.com https://openrouter.ai https://api.openai.com https://api.groq.com https://api.together.xyz https://api.deepseek.com https://api.mistral.ai https://api.anthropic.com ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://*.supabase.co https://*.civitai.com https://*.githubusercontent.com; media-src 'self' blob: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://*.supabase.co https://lu-labs.ai; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'

bundle.shortDescription: LU by LU Labs — private, local AI chat, image, and video generation
bundle.longDescription: LU (by LU Labs) is an open-source desktop app that runs AI chat, image generation, and video generation entirely on your own machine. Ships with a built-in inference engine — zero setup, no external software required — so chat and document RAG work the moment you open the app. Also auto-detects 12 optional local backends (Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, KoboldCpp, llama.cpp, LocalAI, Jan, TabbyAPI, GPT4All, Aphrodite, SGLang, TGI). Includes a coding agent (Codex), an agent mode with 14 tools and MCP support, A/B model comparison, local benchmarking, document chat with RAG, voice chat, and remote access from your phone over LAN or Cloudflare Tunnel. No telemetry, no analytics, no data leaves your device.
